default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GC-AI's feedback on calibration articles and address concerns about continuing the partnership with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GC-AI expressed desire to terminate the contract early due to challenges with content calibration and internal readiness](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [GrowthX will explore options for early termination and provide a final calibration article](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [GC-AI may revisit the partnership in 6 months when they have more internal content and capacity](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration Challenges

  - [Cecilia (GC-AI) found calibration articles too casual and not aligned with their ICP's language](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [GC-AI feels they lack sufficient internal content for proper AI training](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Concerns about feedback cycles taking too long to achieve desired results](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

### Early Termination Request

  - [GC-AI requested to end the 3-month pilot contract early](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Cited reasons: internal content initiatives, feedback cycle duration, and current growth phase challenges](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Asked for consideration of a reduced fee, given unused services (e.g., outreach)](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### GrowthX Response

  - [Offered to produce another calibration article implementing feedback](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Committed to exploring early termination options and associated costs](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Suggested potential future collaboration when GC-AI has more internal content](https://fathom.video/share/BQcytFikSmZZSV2TCkxxWefgryqt4-g9?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

### Technical SEO Update
